subject: Fw: Nadia glass
body:
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: pennville@aol.com

Date: Mon, 25 Feb 2008 17:51:51 
To:nadja2102@yahoo.com, "Zeff susana" <ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com>,       "Barrett Anthony" <ossa1@aol.com>
Subject: Fw: Nadia glass



Sent from my Verizon Wireless BlackBerry

-----Original Message-----
From: pennville@aol.com

Date: Mon, 25 Feb 2008 17:46:16 
To:"Zeff susana" <ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com>,"Barrett Anthony" <ossa1@aol.com>
Subject: Re: Nadia glass


Hi Susana,

I ordered the lavander glass shower doors with the same quality or similar and it is 35 percent less than Galaxy price of $17,500.00. (This is just the shower doors and shelves only). The sample and shop drawing will be approved by you and by the client. 

The manufacturing of the laminated glass is a standard process that any big glass companies can do. The hardwares are ordered from the same companies which are the same quality and therefore rest assured that it will not compromise the design of the glass. 

I want it to be very clear that Zeff Design specified Galaxy but you mentioned that they are very expensive that's why you asked me if I have other supplier. I looked for other supplier to save a lot of money for the client. I am still waiting for the sample and I made a down payment last week.

Regards,

Penn
Sent from my Verizon Wireless BlackBerry

-----Original Message-----
From: "Susana Simonpietri" <ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com>

Date: Mon, 25 Feb 2008 11:05:31 
To:<ossa1@aol.com>, "Penn" <pennville@aol.com>
Cc:"Nadia Marcinkova" <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
Subject: RE: Nadia glass


Zeff design MUST see this sample before any decisions are made on this order. 
I have expressed concern in the past with using an unknown glass vendor for this shower enclosure, and I will continue to do so. I am worried about not only the quality of the glass itself, but also about all the hardware that relates to it. Glass enclosures need to be done at the highest quality to look well, when done cheaply they look absolutely unacceptable and achieve to degrade the entire design intent (not to mention the danger of a huge glass panel cracking or exploding while someone is in the shower). 

Zeff specified Galaxy glass because in our extensive research we were not able to find any other vendor that could deliver an acceptable less costly alternative, and we would like to see the apartment with the product we specified.

Susana Simonpietri
ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com

zeffdesign

515 West 20th St, 4W
New York,  NY  10011
 
P. 212.580.7090 x238
F. 212.580.7181
www.zeffdesign.com

-----Original Message-----
From: ossa1@aol.com [mailto:ossa1@aol.com] 
Sent: Monday, February 25, 2008 11:00 AM
To: Susana Simonpietri; Penn
Cc: Nadia Marcinkova
Subject: Re: Nadia glass

Penn has ordered a sample from another glass company last week. Penn please let us know when it will be available. 
Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T

-----Original Message-----
From: "Susana Simonpietri" <ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com>

Date: Mon, 25 Feb 2008 10:35:07 
To:<ossa1@aol.com>, <Pennville@aol.com>
Cc:<nadja2102@yahoo.com>
Subject: Nadia glass


Anthony, 
  
I got an email from Galaxy glass to let me know that the order had not been placed for the glass and that he had no longer been contacted to any follow up from the GC's part. 
What is going on with this? I thought we were clear that the order had to be done soon to secure the project being finished... This is why I rushed to get the quote for Penn ASAP. 
  
Please advise, 
Susana 
  
Susana Simonpietri 
 <mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com> ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com 
  
zeffdesign 
  
515 West 20th St, 4W 
New York,  NY  10011 
  
P. 212.580.7090 x238 
F. 212.580.7181
